The '''''Stenness Raider''''' was one of the two ore-raiding ships used by the [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] captain [[Finhead Stonebone]] in [[3999 BBY]] to raid [[Ithullan ore hauler]]s. It was a modified Byblos Drive Yards E-2 asteroid mining vehicle. The ''Stenness Raider'' was insectoid in appearance and approximately one hundred meters long.

{{Ship-stub}}

*[[Tales of the Jedi 4|''Tales of the Jedi'' 4]] {{1st}}
